input: session sequences (ordered user-item interactions within a session)
output: next item recommendation (ranked list of items)
backbone: Position-aware Gated Graph Neural Network (GNN) with dual positional encoding
loss: cross-entropy loss (implied by session-based recommendation task)
key_idea: dual positional encoding (DPE) capturing both forward-awareness (initial intention) and backward-awareness (latest intention) to model intention shifts within a session
